  "findings": [
    "Concrete segregation observed due to excessive drop height during placement",
    "Violation of maximum free-fall distance limits for concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the active concrete placement immediately",
    "Reject the segregated concrete already placed in the affected area",
    "Implement drop chutes, elephant trunks, or tremies to limit free-fall distance",
    "Verify placement procedures with the inspector before resuming"
  ],
  "rationale": "Placing concrete from an excessive drop height causes aggregate segregation, which severely compromises the structural integrity and uniformity of the concrete. Under ACI 301 and 304, placement must be halted immediately to correct the discharge method and remove any segregated material before proceeding.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301 Specifications for Structural Concrete",
    "ACI 304R Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete"
  ]
}
